items.title: [正面] genuinely one of if not the best gacha game i've p...
items.summary: genuinely one of if not the best gacha game i've played, I have absolutely zero complains from a gameplay standpoint, if anything the only complaint I could make would be the mediocre translation (to english) and the fact it's a gacha game, but even than the game is so generous towards f2p players that it really doesn't feel like your forced to spend unlike others. 10/10 game.

items.title: [正面] Excelente juego, faltaria mejorar la traduccion
